intro: Between 14 and 25 April 2026, ZCyberNews published six articles under the Fortinet tag. The coverage highlighted two critical vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-59718, carrying a CVSS score of 9.8, and CVE-2026-39808. Four of the articles were classified as critical severity and two as high. The affected sectors included financial services, government, and technology, with the primary regions impacted being Europe and North America.
